evals.expected_output: Verifies git repo + clean working tree, auto-detects upstream via gh api, fetches upstream, shows behind/ahead counts, fast-forwards or merges into default branch, pushes to origin, prints summary.
When already up to date (BEHIND=0), detects it after fetch and exits early without merge or push. When behind, runs full sync flow.
If upstream remote is missing and gh CLI is unavailable, uses AskUserQuestion to get upstream URL from user, then proceeds with sync.
Detects uncommitted changes via git diff, stops with clear stash/commit instructions, does NOT proceed with fetch or merge.
